model: Entangled path-detector state |Ψ⟩=(1/√2)(|L⟩|d_L⟩+|R⟩|d_R⟩). Marginal P(y)=½(|A_L|²+|A_R|²)+s·Re(A_L·A_R*). Eraser: post-select on |±⟩. Born-rule sampling.
honest_framing: This is a small-system quantum-style benchmark running on a classical computer. It faithfully models a two-path entangled state with a detector, but is NOT a simulation of the physical universe. Purpose: validate auditing logic.
